messages.content:
Please correct the grammar: Hello Clyve, 
Please furnish the repair plan together with reworks declaration, with cost code to be charged on 1RW as we have known that it was a design modification/revision. Creation of reworks cost code on IFS is underway, you may used already the said cost code.
Franny team had agreed they will carry out the repair, providing 34hrs for reworks.

Hello Clyve,

Please provide the repair plan along with the rework declaration, including the cost code to be charged to 1RW as it has been identified as a design modification/revision. The creation of the reworks cost code in IFS is currently in progress, so you may begin using the designated cost code.

The Franny team has agreed to carry out the repair, allowing for 34 hours for reworks. 

Thank you.

please correct the grammar: Hello Clyve, 
Please provide the repair plan along with reworks declaration, with the rework cost code to be charged on 1RW as it has been identified as design change/revision. Creation of reworks cost code on IFS currently in progress, so now you may use the designated cost code.
Franny team had agreed they will carry out the repair, allowing of 34hrs for reworks. This process time approval for repair plan will only be the design team since we don’t have class authority and to be verified by QA after reworks have done.

Hello Clyve,

I am requesting the repair plan and reworks declaration, with the rework cost code to be charged to 1RW since it has been identified as a design change/revision. The creation of the reworks cost code in IFS is currently in progress, so you may now use the designated cost code.

The Franny team has agreed to carry out the repair, allowing for 34 hours for reworks. The approval for the repair plan process time will only be given by the design team since we do not have the authority, and it will be verified by QA after the reworks have been completed.

Thank you.
please correct the grammar: For this project the approval for repair plan will only be the design team since we don’t have class authority and to be verified by QA after reworks have done.
For this project, the approval for the repair plan will only be given by the design team as we do not have the authority, and it will be verified by QA after the reworks have been completed.

please correct the grammar: Please provide the repair plan along with reworks declaration, with the rework cost code to be charged on 2RW though design is the contributor as identified to be a design change, cost code should be booked against the reworking department.

Please provide the repair plan along with the reworks declaration, with the rework cost code to be charged to 2RW. Although the design is identified as the contributor to the design change, the cost code should be booked under the reworking department.
please correct the grammar: Although the design is identified as the contributor for the rework due to the design change/revision, cost code should be booked under the reworking department.
Although the design is identified as the contributor for the rework due to the design change/revision, the cost code should be booked under the reworking department.

please correct the grammar:For this project, the approval for repair plan will only be the design team and PTM as we don’t have class authority, and it will be verified by QA after reworks have been completed.
For this project, the approval for the repair plan will only be by the design team and PTM as we do not have the class authority; it will be verified by QA after the reworks have been completed.
Please correct the grammar: Creation of reworks cost code on IFS have been registered, so now you may use the designated cost code.
The registration of the reworks cost code on IFS has been completed, so you may now use the designated cost code.
please correct the grammar: After approval please send the repair plan and reworks declaration to QA department.
After approval, please send the repair plan and reworks declaration to the QA department.
Please correct the grammar: How about for the inverter?
